items.title: Where Chipotle loses McDonald's will pick up, says G Squared's Victoria Greene
items.description: Victoria Greene, G Squared Private Wealth, joins 'The Exchange' to discuss Greene's investing take on McDonald's, Royal Caribbean and Shopify.

items.title: Banco Santander and Cogent Communications have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
items.description: Banco Santander hits new highs with surging profits, rising EPS forecasts, and bold shareholder returns fueling bullish momentum.

items.title: US group Taylor Farms snaps up UK’s Natures Way Foods
items.description: Natures Way Foods supplies UK retailers such as Tesco, Aldi, and Morrisons, along with foodservice customers.

items.title: How McDonald's (MCD) Dividend Hike Signals Confidence in Cash Flow and Growth Strategy
items.description: On October 22, 2025, McDonald's Corporation announced a 5% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to US$1.86 per share, payable on December 15, 2025, for shareholders of record as of December 1, 2025. This higher dividend underscores the company's confidence in its Accelerating the Arches growth strategy and commitment to long-term shareholder returns. We'll examine how McDonald’s increased dividend signals ongoing strength in free cash flow and reinforces confidence in future earnings...

items.title: Earnings live: Spotify stock jumps on strong results, Palantir and Uber stocks fall
items.description: Third quarter earnings season is in full swing, and analysts expect S&P 500 companies grew their profits by 8% during the quarter.
